PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 62325912) FILED BY DEFENDANT REYES, CARMEN

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CARMEN REYES' MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST HER AND TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST MS. REYES ON MAY 21, 2009 ARE NOW VACATED AND THE PURPORTED SERVICE OF SUMMON AND COMPLAINT ON HER IS NOW QUASHED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. =(302/HEK)

Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The case is dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The Court shall also notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Void Default And Default Judgment Ccp 473(D) And To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Schoen, Esq, of Legal Assistance to the Elderly Inc., 415.757.4518, appearing for the Defendant.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

DEFENDANT CARMEN REYES' MOTION TO VACATE VOID DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 473(d) AND TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted: Defendant Carmen Reyes' motion to vacate the default and default judgment entered against her and to quash service of summons is granted in its entirety. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment entered against Ms. Reyes on May 21, 2009 are now vacated and the purported service of summon and complaint on her is now quashed. Order signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/HEK)
